overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-drenched cyberpunk metropolis at night. The player traverses elevated industrial walkways and narrow corridors past massive holographic advertisements, transitioning from enclosed metal passages to open panoramic views of the futuristic skyline bathed in teal and magenta light.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with metal railings and ventilation shafts

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through narrow elevated industrial walkways with metal railings

entered.detail: rusted metal safety railing along the elevated walkway
large steel support beam crossing the narrow passage
large teal advertisement displaying MILFGUARD with a figure in a cowboy hat
vertical advertisement for Cirrus Cola with promotional text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed industrial walkway with metal catwalk railings and visible ventilation shafts. The environment is dimly lit with ambient neon glow from distant advertisements, including a prominent MILFGUARD holographic billboard. The player moves steadily forward through the confined metal corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exterior facade with massive vertical digital billboards

events.description: exits enclosed metal walkway onto open building exterior with large illuminated advertisements

agents.ego_description: traversing the building exterior past towering digital billboards and fire escapes

entered.detail: large white vertical billboard displaying FEEL FREE CIRRUS COLA with cartoon mascot
tall advertisement for Watson Whore with red and white text
rusted metal fire escape stairs attached to building facade
cluster of stacked digital screens showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the enclosed walkway, the scene opens onto a building exterior covered in massive digital billboards. The FEEL FREE CIRRUS COLA advertisement dominates the right side while the WATSON WHORE billboard rises in the center. The player continues along the concrete ledge past metal fire escapes and vertical arrays of glowing screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with MONROE & SAGAN storefront

events.description: enters indoor corridor with bright cyan MONROE & SAGAN neon signage
slows down to observe NPCs standing near the storefront

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the MONROE & SAGAN storefront and nearby pedestrians before continuing through the corridor

notable_agents.action: standing near the MONROE & SAGAN sign looking at a handheld device
walking through the distant corridor wearing a yellow jacket

entered.detail: large bright cyan neon sign reading MONROE & SAGAN above a storefront
dark passage leading deeper into the building structure
horizontal purple fluorescent lights lining the corridor ceiling
pink neon sign with Japanese text reading Blue Moon

segments.scene_description: The player enters an indoor commercial corridor dominated by the bright cyan MONROE & SAGAN neon sign. Two NPCs are visible—one standing nearby using a device, another walking in the distance. The environment shifts from open exterior to enclosed passage with purple neon tube lighting, eventually approaching a pink neon sign for The Moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open panoramic rooftop with cyberpunk city skyline view

events.description: exits corridor onto open rooftop with panoramic view of the city skyline
camera pans to reveal the CYBERHUB hologram and extensive cityscape

agents.ego_description: pausing to pan across the wide view of the neon-lit city skyline and distant holographic displays

entered.detail: massive green holographic projection of a female face with CYBERHUB text
tree with pink illuminated blossoms in the foreground
expansive view of towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements
large advertisement for Kiroshi Optics with Japanese text
tall building with prominent red vertical neon strip and hexagonal patterns

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk city skyline. The massive CYBERHUB hologram dominates the center while a cherry blossom tree with pink blooms occupies the right foreground. The camera pans across the vista, revealing the Kiroshi Optics billboard and towering structures adorned with red and teal neon lights stretching into the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast, neon-lit urban panorama. It begins within a narrow metal walkway flanked by ventilation shafts and the dim glow of a MILFGUARD holographic billboard. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens onto a concrete exterior ledge dominated by massive digital advertisements for Cirrus Cola and Watson Whore. The scene then shifts back indoors through a commercial corridor illuminated by cyan and purple neon signs, passing by distant figures before emerging once more into the open air. Finally, the view expands into a breathtaking skyline vista where a pink cherry blossom tree frames a towering CYBERHUB hologram and a sprawling cityscape of red and teal lights.
